description: This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession. It is sold by Alurmi. In the Enchanting Formulae category. An item from World of Warcraft: The Burning Crusade.
name: Formula: Enchant Gloves - Major Spellpower

normalized_requirements.raw_text: Formula: Enchant Gloves - Major Spellpower Phase 1 Item Level 72 Binds when picked up Requires Enchanting (360) Requires Keepers of Time - Honored Use: Teaches you how to permanently enchant gloves to increase spell damage and healing by up to 20. Permanently enchant gloves to increase damage and healing by up to 20. Requires a level 35 or higher item. Sell Price: 2 This enchanting formula is used for the Enchanting profession.
